titleStmt.title: SII 17.143: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 143. (A.R. No. 123 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.

This inscription mentions the title Kōdaṇḍarāman of the king, after which the sandhi was named. The details of the date given, viz., 13 + 3rd, year, Mēsha, śu. 9. Pūśam regularly correspond to 1265 A.D., March 27; ·28; ·03. It also mentions the 276th day of the same regnal year at the end. Neṭṭūruḍaiyāṉ Iḷaiyāḻvān Kāliṅgarāyaṉ figures as the signatory of the inscription.

It records a grant by the king of 50 vēli of land in Pūvā[ni]lai Sundaraśōḻanallūr, a hamlet in the Mēṟkā-nāḍu free of taxes such as kaḍamai, kuḍimai, poṉvari, antarāyam, kāṇikkai, kāttigaippachchai, kīṟṟuvari, sanduvigrahappēṟu vāśaḻviniyōgam, ōlai-ēḍu paḍi(?), kūṟṟilakkai, kaḍaikkūṭṭilakkai, pāśippāṭṭam, ērivari, iṉavari, iḍaivari, oḷukkunīrppāṭṭam, vīśuvalaippāṭṭam, ariśikāṇam, āyavargam, taṟi-iṟai, taṭṭārppāṭṭam, śekkāyam, magaṇmai, ilāñchiṉai, āṉaichchālai, kudiraippandi, āṇḍu-eḻuttu-ttēvai, paḻattēvai, veṭṭi, nilaiyāḷ, tachchuttāḻvu, āḷ-amañji and nāṭṭuviṉiyōgam for Kōdaṇḍarāmaṉ sandhi named after himself, festivals and repairs in the temple of god Tiruttiṉainagaruḍaiyār in Jayaṇgoṇḍaśōḻa-chchaṅturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēṟkā-nāḍu in Vaḍakarai Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī—tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉmūṉṟāva
tukku Etir mūṉṟāvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu navamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca
payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkā nāṭṭu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruttiṉai nakaruṭaiyār koyil
tevakaṉmi śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkut taṅkaḷ nāyaṉār tiruttiṉai nakaruṭaiyārkku nam perāl kaṭṭiṉa koda
ṇṭarāmaṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat taṅkaḷ nāṭṭilp piṭākai pūvānilai
cuntaracoḻanallūril Innāyaṉār paḻantirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa pañcavaṉmātevivatikkuk kiḻakku vīranārāyaṇaṉ vāyk
kālukku vaṭakku kālaṟutikkut teṟkut tiripuvaṉamātevi vatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukkum meṟkum Innāṉkellaik
kuḷppaṭṭa nilam Aimpatiṟṟu veliyum Itukku Uḷppaṭṭa nattamum Innilattil prāptiyāl Uḷḷa Erinir prāpti Āṟṟukkāl ti
ṭar kaḷar paruvarampu cuṟṟukkulai nīrnilai maranilai Uḷḷiṭṭa samasta pāptikaḷum muṉpuṭai yāraiyum paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷaraiyum bra
hmakṣetramāy varukiṟapaṭiyum muṉṉiṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭiyum tavirttu patiṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ Etir mūṉṟāvatu cittiraimātam mutalaṭa
ṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu Ittāl varum kaṭamai kuṭimai poṉvari Antarāyam kāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai kīṟṟuvari cantuviṟkaṟakam
peṟu vācal viṉiyokam Olaieṭupaṭi kūṟṟikkukaiRead kūṟṟilakkai.kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai pācippāṭṭam Eri vari Iṉavari Iṭaivari Oḻukkunirppā
ṭṭam vīcuvalaippāṭṭam Aricikāṇam Āyavaṟkam taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam cekkāyam makaṇmai Ilāñciṉai Āṉaiccālai kutirai
ppanti Āṇṭueḻuttuttevai paḻattevai veṭṭi nilaiyāḷ taccuttāḻvu Āḷamañci nāṭṭu viṉiyokam Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉait
tāyavaṟkaṅkaḷum Upātiyum Iḻantu Itukku niccayippāṉa poṉṉum nellum taṅkaḷ nāṭṭukku niccayitta mutalile ci
lavāka nam variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkaccoṉṉom Ippaṭikku Iv Olai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu taṅkaḷ nāṭṭuk kaṇakki
lum kaḻittuc cantrātittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Innilam kārum pacāṉamum cittiraikkā
rum kaṭaippūvum karumpu ceṅkaḻunīr vāḻai Uḷḷa koḻuntu Iñci mañcaḷ Eḷḷup payaṟu Uḷḷiṭṭa vāṉpayir puṉpayirum
teṅku kamuku palā mā maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa taṇṭilaikaḷum tāṉ veṇṭum payirc ceytu koṇṭu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupa
vikkavu(m) pārkka tulyam Ivai neṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu patimūṉṟāvatiṉ Etir mūṉṟāvatu nāḷ 276 Ivai neṭ
ṭūruṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .Two more pieces are found along with the same inscription, running as follows. I Piece 1 [lai]kkuṭpaṭṭa ten[ta]lai tuṭaṅka mu[ta]l tākku taṭi 4 ṉāl- 2 nilam � itaṉ vaṭakku taṭi 4 ṉāl nilam � itaṉ vaṭakku taṭi 4 ṉāl īī Piece 1 ṉāl, nilam � itaṉ vaṭakku taṭi 1 ṉāl nilam � itaṉ vaṭakku taṭi 2 ṉāl nilam �• itaṉ 2 vaṭakku taṭi 4 ṉāl nilam 5 itaṉ iṭai [vi]ṭṭu vaṭakku cokkaṉaṉa vāvai taṭiṅkal.
Digital edition of SII 17.143 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
